title: verbascum × lasianthiforme
intro: Verbascum × lasianthiforme, a hybrid plant in the borage family, is a cross between Verbascum lasianthum and Verbascum phoeniceum. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Verbascum × lasianthiforme include its ability to soothe sore throats, calm coughs, and reduce fever, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve wound healing. Verbascum × lasianthiforme can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions.
